findings.blocker: S2-S5: the 4 (really 5, incl uι) per-constituent restrict-naturality squares do not exist in the codebase; each constituent (tensorObj_restrict_iso, dual_restrict_iso≫dualIsoOfIso, dual_unit_iso, tensorObj_unit_iso, uι) is a composite iso through pullback+sheafification, so each square is a bespoke multi-step sub-lemma with no precedent. The blueprint sketch treats them as routine and omits uι.
